Search by Keyword 
 
Reasons to join our team!

Do you have a passion for making a 
difference in people’s lives? For being 
the reason their day is a bit brighter and 
happier? Do you understand how what 
you do, big or small, people facing, or 
behind the scenes, can have a huge 
impact on how someone feels each 
day? If you do, then you sound like our 
type of team member. Learn more

About our hiring process

As soon as you submit your application 
or resume your journey to an exciting 
career with The Brenda Strafford 
Foundation kicks off! We are always 
looking for passionate caring people 
and know that we are stronger when we 
have a diverse workforce that bring a 
wide range of experiences, knowledge, 
and ideas. Learn more

Employee stories

Read employee stories and testimonials 
to learn more about working at The 
Brenda Strafford Foundation. Learn more
